mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN total_score >= 90 THEN N'90-100' WHEN total_score >= 80 THEN N'80-89' WHEN total_score >= 70 THEN N'70-79' WHEN total_score >= 60 THEN N'60-69' ELSE N'<60' END AS scoreRange, COUNT(*) AS count FROM reviews r JOIN peer_review_assignments pra ON r.pra_id = pra.pra_id WHERE pra.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} GROUP BY CASE WHEN total_score >= 90 THEN N'90-100' WHEN total_score >= 80 THEN N'80-89' WHEN total_score >= 70 THEN N'70-79' WHEN total_score >= 60 THEN N'60-69' ELSE N'<60' END ORDER BY scoreRange

SELECT u.real_name AS submitter, STDEV(r.total_score) AS scoreStddev, COUNT(r.review_id) AS reviewCount, MIN(r.total_score) AS minScore, MAX(r.total_score) AS maxScore, CASE WHEN STDEV(r.total_score) > 15 THEN N'异常' ELSE N'正常' END AS alert FROM submissions s JOIN users u ON s.student_id = u.user_id JOIN peer_review_assignments pra ON s.submission_id = pra.submission_id AND pra.status = 'completed' JOIN reviews r ON pra.pra_id = r.pra_id WHERE s.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} GROUP BY s.submission_id, u.real_name HAVING COUNT(r.review_id) >= 2 ORDER BY scoreStddev DESC

SELECT u.real_name AS realName, u.user_id AS userId, COUNT(r.review_id) AS reviewCount, COALESCE(AVG(r.total_score), 0) AS avgScore, COALESCE(MIN(r.total_score), 0) AS minScore, COALESCE(MAX(r.total_score), 0) AS maxScore, s.final_score AS finalScore FROM users u JOIN submissions s ON u.user_id = s.student_id AND s.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} LEFT JOIN peer_review_assignments pra ON pra.submission_id = s.submission_id AND pra.status = 'completed' LEFT JOIN reviews r ON pra.pra_id = r.pra_id WHERE u.role_id = 4 GROUP BY u.user_id, u.real_name, s.final_score ORDER BY avgScore DESC

SELECT u.real_name AS realName, u.username, u.user_id AS userId, COUNT(r.review_id) AS reviewCount, COALESCE(AVG(r.total_score), 0) AS avgScore, COALESCE(MIN(r.total_score), 0) AS minScore, COALESCE(MAX(r.total_score), 0) AS maxScore, s.final_score AS finalScore FROM users u JOIN submissions s ON u.user_id = s.student_id AND s.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} LEFT JOIN peer_review_assignments pra ON pra.submission_id = s.submission_id AND pra.status = 'completed' LEFT JOIN reviews r ON pra.pra_id = r.pra_id WHERE u.role_id = 4 GROUP BY u.user_id, u.real_name, u.username, s.final_score ORDER BY avgScore DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN s.final_score >= 90 THEN N'90-100' WHEN s.final_score >= 80 THEN N'80-89' WHEN s.final_score >= 70 THEN N'70-79' WHEN s.final_score >= 60 THEN N'60-69' ELSE N'<60' END AS scoreRange, COUNT(*) AS count FROM submissions s WHERE s.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} AND s.final_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CASE WHEN s.final_score >= 90 THEN N'90-100' WHEN s.final_score >= 80 THEN N'80-89' WHEN s.final_score >= 70 THEN N'70-79' WHEN s.final_score >= 60 THEN N'60-69' ELSE N'<60' END ORDER BY scoreRange
